onboarding.connectSubtitle: You need to connect an Instagram Business or Creator account for automations to work.
onboarding.pageRequiredNote: Your Instagram account must be linked to a Facebook Page. If it isn't, set that up in the Instagram app first.
onboarding.successSubtitle: Your account @{{username}} is connected. Let's create your first rule.

home.title: Home
home.tokenExpiringBanner: Your Instagram connection is expiring soon, please reconnect.
home.emptyState: You don't have any rules yet. Create your first automation to get started.

rules.title: Rules
rules.deleteRuleConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this rule? This can't be undone.
rules.step1Subtitle: Which posts should this rule watch comments on?
rules.step2Subtitle: Which word(s) in a comment should trigger this rule?
rules.step3Subtitle: Automatic reply posted under the comment (optional)
rules.publicReplyPlaceholder: e.g. Thanks for asking, we sent you the details via DM 💌
rules.step4Subtitle: Build the message and buttons sent to this person
rules.dmMessagePlaceholder: e.g. Hi {{username}}! You can see our price list below 👇

paywall.title: Upgrade to Instabot Pro
paywall.freePostNote: Your first post includes one free automation
paywall.subtitle: Upgrade to Pro for unlimited rules, all posts, and AI-powered replies
